logline: Ecuador a stage for all stories
principalDescription: Ecuador's diverse landscapes, rich culture, and growing film industry make it an ideal destination for filmmakers seeking unique and authentic locations. With government incentives and a welcoming atmosphere, Ecuador offers a compelling stage for all stories.

locacionSeccion.parrafo: The landscapes of Ecuador, its UNESCO World Heritage sites, and its extraordinary biodiversity offer a wide range of narrative possibilities with minimal travel.

documentosSeccion.parrafo: Documents of interest to companies and people interested in filming in Ecuador.

lista.nombre: Film shooting in the Galápagos Islands

associations.nombre: Asociación de Productores Audiovisuales del Ecuador (APAE)
Corporación de Productores Audiovisuales del Ecuador (COPAE)

suppliersSection.parrafo: Catalog of companies that provide a wide variety of film and audiovisual production services. Companies that can support the execution of audiovisual projects in Ecuador.
suppliersSection.message: If you have a company that offers audiovisual production services, you can register it in this catalogue

aboutEcuador.title: Cultural and Historical Richness
aboutEcuador.text: Ecuador's colonial cities, such as Quito and Cuenca (both UNESCO World Heritage Sites), along with its vibrant indigenous traditions, provide authentic and visually stunning backdrops for any production.

aboutEcuador.title: Diverse Locations in a Compact Territory
aboutEcuador.text: From the Andes Mountains and the Amazon Rainforest to the Pacific Coast and the iconic Galapagos Islands, Ecuador offers an incredible variety of landscapes within a relatively small area. This allows productions to shoot multiple scenes without the need for extensive travel.

aboutEcuador.title: Growing Film Industry Infrastructure
aboutEcuador.text: Ecuador's film industry is rapidly developing, with local crews, equipment rentals, and post-production facilities available to support international projects.

aboutEcuador.title: Government Incentives and Support
aboutEcuador.text: Ecuador offers attractive incentives for international productions, including tax exemptions, streamlined permits, and logistical support through institutions like the Ecuador Film Commission.

aboutEcuador.title: Warm and Welcoming Culture
aboutEcuador.text: Ecuadorians are known for their hospitality and willingness to collaborate, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable filming experience.

filmCommission.parrafo: The Film Commission, managed by the Institute of Cinema and Audiovisual Creation (ICCA), is the official link for international productions in Ecuador. We provide information and technical advice, ensuring a smooth and efficient filming process.

permissions.titulo: Migration: Crew Visas and Stay Authorizations
